Container.Name: Vellichor
Container.Overview: Self-hosted web app that turns your written stories and ebooks into narrated audiobooks using the Kokoro-82M TTS model. Multi-voice character casting, background ambience, chaptered M4B + per-chapter MP3 output, and auto-export to an Audiobookshelf library. Optional NVIDIA GPU acceleration (requires the Nvidia Driver plugin); falls back to CPU. Optional AI "Smart cast" needs a separate Ollama container — set Ollama URL below; without it the rule-based Quick detect is used.
Container.Description: Turn stories & ebooks into narrated audiobooks with Kokoro-82M TTS. Multi-voice casting, ambience, M4B/MP3, Audiobookshelf export. GPU optional.

Config.Name: App data (/data)
Config.Description: Uploads, job history, and the model cache (Kokoro). Persisted.

Config.Name: Audiobook library (/library)
Config.Description: Optional. Where finished audiobooks are exported, e.g. your Audiobookshelf library share. Leave blank if unused.

Config.Name: Login password
Config.Description: Web UI login password. LEAVE BLANK ONLY ON A TRUSTED LAN — blank disables authentication entirely.

Config.Name: Secret key
Config.Description: Session-cookie signing key. Generate with: openssl rand -hex 32. Blank = a random key each restart (everyone gets logged out on restart).

Config.Name: Ollama URL (AI Smart cast)
Config.Description: Optional. URL of a separate Ollama container for AI Smart cast, e.g. http://192.168.1.50:11434. Blank disables Smart cast (rule-based Quick detect still works).

Config.Name: Smart cast model
Config.Description: Ollama model used for Smart cast (must be pulled in your Ollama container).

Config.Name: Completion notify URL
Config.Description: Optional ntfy/gotify URL to get a push when a conversion finishes.

Config.Name: Export owner UID
Config.Description: UID to own exported audiobook files so your library app can read them (Unraid 'nobody' = 99).

Config.Name: NVIDIA_VISIBLE_DEVICES
Config.Description: GPU(s) to expose. Requires the Nvidia Driver plugin. NO GPU? Clear 'Extra Parameters' (remove --runtime=nvidia) and ignore this.
